## 11.14 Tables

**TABLE 11.1 Numerical values for functions used in Table 11.2**  
Numerical values for the plate coefficients $F, C, L$, and $G$ for values of $b/r, b/a, r_o/a$, and $r_o/r$, respectively, from 0.05 to 1.0. Poisson’s ratio is 0.30.  
The table headings are given for $G_1$ to $G_{19}$ for the various values of $r_o/r$.† Also listed in the last five lines are values for the most used denominators for the ratios $b/a$
